revision.comment: update category link
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qqq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]" to ""
revision.text:
{{CatDiffuse}}
{{category explanation|sub-categories of articles about individual people in [[ancient history]] ([[BCE]] and until the end of [[Late Antiquity]] at around AD 800). Note that the year of death category should subcategorize articles into this category. There is no need to categorize articles into this category directly.}} {{CatRel|People of late antiquity}} :''For articles about particular historic groups of people, see [[:Category:Ancient peoples]].''
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:People by period]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Ancient history|People]] [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]]
[[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Ancient people]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Ancient people]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]][[en:Ancient people]][[Category:qq]]

{{CatDiffuse}}
{{category explanation|sub-categories of articles about individual people in [[ancient history]] ([[BCE]] and until the end of [[Late Antiquity]] at around AD 800). Note that the year of death category should subcategorize articles into this category. There is no need to categorize articles into this category directly.}} {{CatRel|People of late antiquity}} :''For articles about particular historic groups of people, see [[:Category:Ancient peoples]].''
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:People by period]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Ancient history|People]] [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]]
[[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Ancient people]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Ancient people]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Ancient people]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
revision.text:
{{CatDiffuse}}
{{category explanation|sub-categories of articles about individual people in [[ancient history]] ([[BCE]] and until the end of [[Late Antiquity]] at around AD 800). Note that the year of death category should subcategorize articles into this category. There is no need to categorize articles into this category directly.}} {{CatRel|People of late antiquity}} :''For articles about particular historic groups of people, see [[:Category:Ancient peoples]].''

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "tab went inactive so I need to add another category" to "qq"
Bot: tidy & size tag (6 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (5 members)

Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "

Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
revision.text:
==Old Content== ==Old Content== ==Old Content== {{CatDiffuse}} {{category explanation|sub-categories of articles about individual people in [[:en:Ancient history|Ancient history]] ([[:en:BCE|BCE]] and until the end of [[:en:en:Late Antiquity|en:Late Antiquity]] at around AD 800). Note that the year of death category should subcategorize articles into this category. There is no need to categorize articles into this category directly.}} {{CatRel|People of late antiquity}} :''For articles about particular historic groups of people, see [[:Category:Ancient peoples]].''
[[Category:Ancient history|People]]
[[en:Category:Ancient people]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{CatDiffuse}}
{{category explanation|sub-categories of articles about individual people in [[:en:Ancient history|Ancient history]] ([[:en:BCE|BCE]] and until the end of [[:en:en:Late Antiquity|en:Late Antiquity]] at around AD 800). Note that the year of death category should subcategorize articles into this category. There is no need to categorize articles into this category directly.}}
{{CatRel|People of late antiquity}}
{{wikidata link|Q7087576}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:Ancient people]]
<!--categories-->

[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ancient_people here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

Note that the year of death category should subcategorize articles into this category. There is no need to categorize articles into this category directly.}}
